stocks.impact_theory: Reports emerged that President Trump plans to invoke emergency powers to facilitate the restart of Sable Offshore's operations off the California coast, amid a standoff with regulators. This news triggered a sentiment shift from regulatory uncertainty to optimism. Economic implications include boosted US oil production amid Iran tensions and rising oil prices. Market psychology: FOMO buying on political intervention. Historical parallel: 2022 Exxon permits under Biden. Analogies: 1) Like a dam breaking after years of drought - pent-up supply floods market. 2) Political lifeline tossed to a sinking ship in stormy oil seas.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Multiple reports (Yahoo, Seeking Alpha) of 15-20% jumps; X sentiment positive on energy plays amid war news. Web searches confirm trader bets on Trump intervention. Continued momentum likely into March 14.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for 20%+ gains if restart confirmed; target $22.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Avoid or short if legal hurdles persist; potential 10% drop.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Regulatory backlash, oil price reversal from Iran de-escalation, high short interest.

stocks.justification: Overwhelming news volume, consistent price surges, ties to broader energy sentiment from geopolitical events.

stocks.impact_theory: Amprius reported Q4 2025 results with revenue up YoY, issuing 2026 guidance for $125M+ revenue (70% growth) and reduced losses. Shift from skepticism to excitement on EV battery scalability. Implications: Positions in high-energy density batteries amid EV boom. Psychology: Volume spike signals breakout. Parallels: QuantumScape hype cycles. Analogies: 1) Rocket fuel for stagnant EV sector. 2) Like upgrading from coal to nuclear in power storage.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: StockTitan ranks #2 monthly gainer +58%; Yahoo/Motley Fool coverage on surge post-guidance. Limited X but positive EV sentiment.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Momentum trade for 30% upside on partnerships.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short if misses production ramps; 15% downside.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Execution delays, competition from CATL, dilution.

stocks.justification: Strong guidance but smaller cap, volatile; backed by earnings but needs follow-through.

stocks.impact_theory: NIO posted first-ever quarterly profit, sparking mixed reactions amid China EV price wars. Implications: Path to profitability reduces burn rate concerns. Psychology: Relief rally but analyst caution on growth. Parallels: Tesla 2013 profitability milestone. Analogies: 1) First green shoot in desert of losses. 2) Like a phoenix rising from EV subsidy ashes.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Yahoo video highlights profit; premarket mover per CNBC/X. Sentiment shift from loss-making to sustainable.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Buy dips for 15% rebound on deliveries.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short if China demand weakens; 10% drop.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Competition, tariffs, CEO pay package scrutiny.

stocks.justification: Historic profit but mixed analyst views, EV sector volatility.

stocks.impact_theory: TD Cowen upgrades to Buy ahead of R2 SUV unveil at SXSW March 12; Autonomy updates. Shift to growth optimism. Implications: Mass-market expansion. Psychology: Catalyst hype. Parallels: Ford F-150 Lightning launch. Analogies: 1) Compact cannonball in EV wars. 2) Bridge from luxury to mainstream EVs.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Yahoo/CNBC coverage on upgrade; X mentions as mover. Ties to EV focus.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long ahead of R2 details; 20% potential.

stocks.impact_theory: CEO Shantanu Narayen to step down after 18 years, amid AI disruption concerns and solid earnings. Sentiment from stability to uncertainty on leadership transition. Implications: Potential strategy shifts in AI race. Psychology: Fear of unknown successor. Parallels: Microsoft Ballmer to Nadella. Analogies: 1) Captain jumping ship mid-voyage. 2) Changing goalie before playoffs.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: CNBC/Reuters report 8-9% drop premarket; investor fears on AI continuity per web searches.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Buy dip if earnings strong; rebound 10%.

stocks.justification: Direct CEO news with immediate price reaction, high coverage.
